arts.ttl: Former Celtic boss lands new role managing MLS club
arts.sum: A former Celtic boss has landed his second role managing within the MLS.

arts.ttl: Inside Dermot Desmond's summit with Celtic powerbrokers as one 'myth' about supremo torn apart
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers joined the Hoops' higher-ups to meet with Desmond in Ireland

arts.ttl: Neil Lennon fancies 'another crack' at management job as ex-Celtic boss targets next role
arts.sum: Neil Lennon has 12 winners’ medals from his time as a manager. Still, Lennon is enjoying his time in the media on commentary and punditry duties for the likes of Premier Sports and TNT Sports.

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel shares secret behind Celtic transfer as he opens up on 'bit of banter' with Rangers fans
arts.sum: The Hoops No1 has been a top performer for Brendan Rodgers and showed his class in the League Cup Final shootout

arts.ttl: Popular Celtic theatre show to return in 2025, tickets still available
arts.sum: Celtic claim that a ticket to the event would be the "perfect Christmas gift".

arts.ttl: Jota's post-Celtic frustration continues as surprise Rennes stance adopted ahead of January window
arts.sum: Unfortunately, the 25-year-old didn’t enjoy fond memories of Saudi Arabia, scoring five times in 25 outings before Rennes snapped Jota up for €8 million during the summer . Celtic icon Jota could leave Rennes in January

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney tipped to 'engineer' Celtic return by Parkhead ally as firm Mikel Arteta stance can't halt Arsenal exit
arts.sum: The Scotland defender could see the Arsenal boss abruptly halt his dream move

arts.ttl: Kieran Tierney's Arsenal future under scrutiny: Pundit opinions on a Celtic return
arts.sum: The next transfer window is just around the corner... and Celtic are looking to do business.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers singles out Jim Goodwin as Celtic prepare for firm Dundee United challenge
arts.sum: Celtic take on Dundee United this weekend in what marks Brendan Rodgers’ first trip to Tannadice across two spells north of the border. Brendan Rodgers on Dundee United and Jim Goodwin

arts.ttl: 'At the moment...' Mikel Arteta breaks silence on Kieran Tierney Arsenal future as Celtic made to sweat
arts.sum: Mikel Arteta has refused to rule out a Kieran Tierney Arsenal exit – but claims the defender still deserves to be in the squad at the Emirates. Mikel Arteta claims Tierney still has ‘big part’ to play in Arsenal squad
